lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Hi. How can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me?

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Sorry, I'm not on duty.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: PLEASE DON'T KILL ME!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was... looking to be healed.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: No way, I'm out of here just as soon as I've packed up my stuff!

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: You look healthy to me!

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you see a lot of injured fighters?

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Yes I do. Thankfully we can cope with almost anything. Jaraah really is a wonderful surgeon, his methods are a little unorthodox but he gets the job done.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: I shouldn't tell you this but his nickname is 'The Butcher'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's reassuring.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you come here often?

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: I work here, so yes!

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: You're silly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about your cape?

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: The Cape of Hitpoints doubles the speed of your hitpoints replenishing when worn. Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a Skillcape of Hitpoints from you?

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Sorry, I'm under orders to not sell capes right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a Skillcape of Hitpoints from you?

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Why, certainly my friend. However, owning such an item makes you part of an elite group and wearing it will double the speed of your hitpoints replenishing.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Such a privilege will cost you 99,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, that's much too pricey.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: I'm sorry you feel that way. Still if you change your mind...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, that's not too expensive for such a magnificent cape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Well come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Wear this cape in good health, my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Surgeon General Tafani
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!
